RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crsp_page_dbtablename_by_suffix.sql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sp_page_dbtablename_by_suffix$($implDb2LUWSPStandardArgs$$iterate Columns( each sparg_CommaTableCol )$$poptop Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each implDb2LUWSPSpecPriorArg )$ ) \\ dynamic result sets 1 \\ language sql \\ begin$implDb2LUWSPPageBySuffixDeclarations$ \\ begin$switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecUser empty SecSession empty default implDb2LUWSPReadEnforceSec$$poptop Table implDb2LUWSPPageTableImplBody$ \\ end; \\ end
RuleSet.GenRule: \\ declare permissionFlag integer; \\ declare isSystemUser integer; \\ declare syscurs cursor with return to client for \\ select$poptop Table implDb2LUWSelectTableColumns$, \\ $poptop Table lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $lower poptop Table ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ where \\ $iterate Columns( first implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$poptop Table restrictReadByIndexQuery$$switch IsUnique yes empty default implSPReadTableOrderByDescendingPKey$$implSPReadTableFetchFirst$; \\ declare syspage cursor with return to client for \\ select$poptop Table implDb2LUWSelectTableColumns$, \\ $poptop Table lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $lower poptop Table ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ where \\ $iterate Columns( first implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$poptop Table restrictReadByIndexQuery$$restrictAndBeforePrior$$switch IsUnique yes empty default implSPReadTableOrderByDescendingPKey$$implSPReadTableFetchFirst$;$implDb2LUWSPPageBySuffixDeclarationsPart2$

\\ declare usercurs cursor with return to client for \\ select$poptop Table implDb2LUWSelectTableColumns$, \\ $poptop Table lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $lower poptop Table ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ where \\ $iterate Columns( first implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$poptop Table restrictReadByIndexQuery$$poptop Table implDb2LUWReadRestrictSec$$switch IsUnique yes empty default implSPReadTableOrderByDescendingPKey$$implSPReadTableFetchFirst$; \\ declare userpage cursor with return to client for \\ select$poptop Table implDb2LUWSelectTableColumns$, \\ $poptop Table lower reference BaseClass ClassCode$.revision as revision \\ from $lower DbSchemaName$.$poptop Table DbTableName$ as $lower poptop Table ClassCode$$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implDb2LUWClassCodeJoinSuperTable default empty$ \\ where \\ $iterate Columns( first implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereFragBindVar each implDb2LUWIndexColumnWhereAndFragBindVar )$$poptop Table restrictReadByIndexQuery$$poptop Table implDb2LUWReadRestrictSec$$restrictAndBeforePrior$$switch IsUnique yes empty default implSPReadTableOrderByDescendingPKey$$implSPReadTableFetchFirst$;
